title: abutilon sylvaticum
intro: Abutilon sylvaticum, also known as the velvet leaf or Indian mallow, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Abutilon sylvaticum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Abutilon sylvaticum are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
